who: HR payroll teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 employee benefit deductions/month
offer: For HR payroll teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 employee benefit deductions/month, inaccurate tracking causes payroll discrepancies. We provide reconciliation reports instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate tracking of employee benefit deductions leading to payroll discrepancies.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR payroll teams
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to HR payroll teams with demo video
Community forums for sharing payroll tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry and monthly report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant community
